release() - Method in class com.webmethods.caf.allocateteam.ClientSideError

resetServiceErrors() - Method in class com.webmethods.caf.allocateteam.AllocateTeamDefaultviewView
This method resets the error reporting outputs of the portlets web services
resetSharedMessaging() - Method in class com.webmethods.caf.allocateteam.AllocateTeamDefaultviewView
This method resets the CreateErrorTag service parameters and output and sets the portlet flag to false
